title: phalangium angustifolium
intro: Phalangium angustifolium, also known as Narrow-leaf Phalangium, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Phalangium angustifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Phalangium angustifolium are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
